issues.description: Action type is 'SearchDeck' with destination 'hand', but card text says 'place at the bottom of the owner's deck' — should use a deck placement action, not search to hand
Destination is 'hand' but effect requires placing card at bottom of deck
Second trigger 'Trigger' with 'PlaySelf' action is extraneous and not supported by card text — card only has one effect: On Play, search and place
Filter should specify 'Character' type, not just cost; text reads 'Character with a cost of 3 or less'
